name: Chocolate Covered Cherries (Party Cooking)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the finely crushed vanilla wafer, powdered sugar, and chopped walnuts in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine boiling water, butter, corn syrup, and instant powdered coffee until well mixed.
3. Add the second mixture to the first, stirring gently until combined.
4. Shape approximately 1/2 tablespoon of the mixture around each cherry.
5. Cover the cherries in an airtight container and refrigerate for at least one hour.
6. Melt chocolate chips in the microwave (or using a double boiler).
7. Holding each cherry stem, dip the coated cherries into the melted chocolate, ensuring they are completely covered.
8. Place the dipped cherries on a wire rack over wax paper.
9. After 5 minutes, garnish with optional sprinkles, if desired.
10. Refrigerate until the chocolate has hardened.
Yield: Approximately 2 1/2 dozen.
